# Companion Planting in Containers

Some plants grow better together.

## Classic container pairings

Tomatoes with basil, peppers with parsley, and lettuce with radishes all share pots well.

## Pairings to avoid

Fennel inhibits most vegetables. Beans dislike onions and garlic.

## Pot size for pairs

A shared pot needs at least 25 litres so both root systems have room.
